name: 系绳匕首（★） | 外表生锈
nameZh: 系绳匕首（★） | 外表生锈
descriptionEn: This fixed-blade survival knife is designed to withstand being used as both a weapon and a tool, such as for setting traps, hunting animals or cutting foliage. The handle is wrapped in a length of multi-purpose paracord. This memento from Siege is still perfectly operational although the exterior surfaces have rusted. Scars build character
descriptionZh: 这把拥有固定刀片的求生刀具为多功能用刀，即可充当武器也可用作工具。比如：可用来布置陷阱，狩猎野兽或砍断树枝。刀具握把用多功能伞绳裹住。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器可以用一句话来形容：“败絮其外，金玉其中”。 疤痕塑造品格
